features: COMPLETE SET: Three-piece bathroom cleaning set includes a toilet brush, corner brush, and scrub brush for comprehensive cleaning needs
ERGONOMIC DESIGN: Natural wooden handles with grey accents provide comfortable grip and excellent control during cleaning tasks
VERSATILE USE: Multi-purpose brushes suitable for bathroom surfaces, sinks, tiles, floors and hard-to-reach corners
DURABLE BRISTLES: Firm, natural bristles effectively tackle dirt and grime while maintaining their shape for long-lasting performance
PRACTICAL FEATURES: Comfortable Curved handles and angled brush heads designed for optimal reach and thorough cleaning of various surfaces Visit our storefront for similar products
description: Transform your cleaning routine with this comprehensive 3-piece bathroom brush set from GLEAMAX. The set includes a toilet brush, corner brush, and scrub brush, each thoughtfully designed with sturdy natural bristles for thorough cleaning of various surfaces. The ergonomic handles provide comfortable grip and optimal control while scrubbing. The toilet brush features a circular head perfect for reaching under the rim, while the corner brush excels at targeting tight spaces and grout lines. The versatile scrub brush is ideal for sinks, tiles, and general surface cleaning. The durable construction ensures long-lasting performance, while the practical design allows for easy storage. Each brush is crafted with attention to detail, featuring strong bristles that effectively tackle dirt and grime without damaging surfaces. Whether it's daily maintenance or deep cleaning sessions, this complete set offers the right tool for every bathroom cleaning task.
